title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models from Python.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; chat, stream, and pull models.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as LLM, chat, and embedding components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, model manager, RAG, multi-user) – successor to Ollama-WebUI.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent builder API, streaming, and embedding support.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive CLI wrapper for Ollama with chat history, syntax highlighting, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Turn any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot-style code-completion service for VS Code.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma/Qdrant for local document Q&A.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that brings Ollama models into any server with slash commands and thread support.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix derivation to build and run Ollama declaratively on Linux/macOS with GPU acceleration.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart for deploying Ollama in Kubernetes with optional GPU nodes and PVC model cache.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a CI service for testing LLM-powered features in pipelines.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Async Rust crate for Ollama with Tokio, Serde, and streaming support; published on crates.io.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with .NET 6+ support, System.Text.Json, and IAsyncEnumerable streaming.

title: ollama-zig
summary: Zig client library for Ollama using std.http with streaming chat and minimal allocations.

title: ollama-rfcs
summary: Public RFC repository for proposing and discussing new features in the Ollama ecosystem.

title: reddit/r/ollama
summary: Active subreddit for sharing tips, models, and integrations around Ollama.

title: Hacker News: Ollama discussion
summary: Recent HN thread comparing Ollama performance and alternatives for local LLM serving.

title: Ollama models library
summary: Official catalog of 100+ pre-converted models (Llama 3, Phi-3, Mixtral, etc.) with pull commands.
